name: mcp_server_per_hosting_provider
friction: Need real MCP servers deployed across multiple hosting providers to measure actual latency
output: 8 live MCP servers, one per hosting provider

name: tools_list_latency_measurer
friction: Need automated tools/list latency measurements from multiple geographic locations
output: tools_list_TIMESTAMP.json files — local results/ + GitHub Actions artifacts (90d retention)

name: latency_measurement_results_collector
friction: Pinger results are scattered (local MacBook + GitHub Actions artifacts) — analyzer needs a single consolidated source
input: pipeline_components.json (this registry) — reads result locations from each pinger entry
output: individual result files pushed append-only to the `data` branch — one file per run, never modified

name: pipeline_migration_verification_checklist
friction: After a directory or GitHub org migration, an agent has no systematic way to verify that all references, remotes, plists, and verifiers are clean and operational
output: Structured JSON report — checks_run, passed, failed, per-check status with raw output and action_taken
when_to_use: After any migration of directory paths or GitHub organization on this project — run before declaring the migration complete
when_not_to_use: For day-to-day component health monitoring — use each component's own verify.js instead
